title: EARLY CHILDHOOD AND ELEMENTARY SCHOOL PROGRAMS - 211info
text: SANDY GRADE SCHOOL EARLY CHILDHOOD AND ELEMENTARY SCHOOL PROGRAMS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides after school activities, parent child play groups, school readiness, and parenting classes to children and families. 38955 Pleasant Street Sandy, OR 97055 Eligibility: Ages 0-6 and their families Hours: Varies by activity Email (503) 272-1801 -. Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 272-0937 Ext: 801 Main phone Main phone (503) 272-1801 April Dobson [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or email to register for activities. Families can also be referred by counselors or other agencies FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: City of Sandy Services: Children's Play Groups Parent/Child Activity Groups Parenting Skills Classes School Readiness Programs Youth Enrichment Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - FAMILY RESOURCE NAVIGATION If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
